visual_description: The scene opens with a close-up of two men in a dimly lit room. The man on the left, wearing a white shirt and glasses, is partially visible. The man on the right, in a light blue shirt, is smiling and looking towards the left. The camera then cuts to a man in a white shirt and black tie standing in a modern office space with glass walls. He has a lanyard with an ID badge around his neck and is looking forward with a neutral expression, his right hand resting on his hip.
audio_description: A male voice speaks in Mandarin Chinese. The audio is clear and the tone is serious and informative.
